Veyonis Linktree

Also, join the English Veyonis fan Discord. We've got lore discussions and official lore too, creator rooms, bot sharing, plenty of fanart, occasional streaming, and more. Almost 300 members and everything. It's pretty neat and I'd encourage you to join if you wanna.

Feel free to copy stuff from my open personality and lorebooks and edit them freely (or don't) for your own stuff. In fact I encourage you to. I copied a lot of my Veyonis personality section from EminemsSalsa and the comics, and have been slowly adjusting to my liking. (Just remember to find my latest bot since it'll be most up to date. I'm constantly tweaking and editing these to be more accurate.)

CW: General themes of trauma, which can include things like mental illness, physical harm, and emotional instability. I'd recommend you read through my defs. As for this bot in particular, it's not really cheating, but it is Jessie being forced to watch two people she's got a thing for fuck.

Leave reviews (not empty) or Yuna will cry.

Yapping section: Request bot from Cyektor. This isn't exactly cucking, but it's close enough. I tried my best to make a semi-serious bot about the topic. Once again, it's Jessie.
